title: OpenDyslexic Font
description: A simple font-swap to aid people who struggle with dyslexia.
body:
A simple resourcepack that replaces the default Minecraft font with the OpenDyslexic font, which aims to help people with dyslexia. While I am not personally dyslexic, this resourcepack may help people play the game in a way that's more comfortable for them.

![Cover image](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/cawT25HC/images/16bc9df82de315cda254c80dd3a7d361018bdb90.png)

[![plexion](https://res.plexion.dev/badges/plexion_64h.png)](https://l.plexion.dev/opendyslexicfont)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@2/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_64h.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/opendyslexicfont)
